summary: Added a compact animated Mission Scan to the Path Map so clicked lanes open with route, gate, proof, task, unlock, and future state.
changes: Replaced the plain Path Map stat strip with renderPathMissionScan.
Derived six mission stages from existing lane trail, gate, proof, task, outcome, and route-node data.
Added a desktop orbit core, route runner, scan sweep, compact stats, and mission stage rail.
Compressed mobile and tablet views into internal horizontal stats/stage rails with the orbit core hidden.
Added reduced-motion coverage for the new scan sweep and runner.
Updated README and added a focused contract test.
next_iteration: Improve the Path Map route node board itself with better animated connections.
Compact the Command deck first screen further.
Continue adding premium generated textures and bot/avatar motion surfaces.
